column2: Event timestamp from the embedded device date field or syslog prefix. 事件时间戳，来自设备 date 字段或 syslog 前缀。
Firewall device name or host that emitted the event. 产生该事件的防火墙设备名或主机名。
Firewall management module such as policy zone blacklist webui cli or flow control. 防火墙管理模块，例如策略、安全域、黑名单、webui、cli 或流量控制。
Canonical firewall event category such as policy_rule zone_config blacklist admin_session or flow_control. 规范化后的防火墙事件类别，例如策略规则、安全域配置、黑名单、管理员会话或流量控制。
Normalized action requested by the administrator such as add set del login logout show or clear. 规范化后的操作动作，例如添加、修改、删除、登录、退出、显示或清空。
Administrator or operator account referenced by the event. 事件中涉及的管理员或操作员账号。
Management client IP address from the from field. 管理客户端 IP，通常来自日志中的 from 字段。
Normalized result such as success failure or unknown. 规范化后的执行结果，例如成功、失败或未知。
Policy source address object or literal address from sa. 策略源地址对象或 sa 字段中的源地址。
Policy destination address object or literal address from da. 策略目的地址对象或 da 字段中的目的地址。
Inbound interface referenced by a firewall rule. 防火墙规则引用的入接口。
Outbound interface referenced by a firewall rule. 防火墙规则引用的出接口。
Inbound security zone referenced by a firewall rule. 防火墙规则引用的源安全域或入方向安全域。
Outbound security zone referenced by a firewall rule. 防火墙规则引用的目的安全域或出方向安全域。
Firewall service or protocol object referenced by a rule. 规则引用的防火墙服务或协议对象。
Firewall policy identifier from policy. 来自 policy 字段的防火墙策略标识。
Firewall rule identifier from id. 来自 id 字段的防火墙规则标识。
Stable composed identifier for a firewall rule. 用于唯一标识防火墙规则的稳定组合键。
Normalized policy type such as permit deny nat proxy port_map ip_map or antiddos. 规范化后的策略类型，例如允许、拒绝、NAT、代理、端口映射、IP 映射或抗 DDoS。
Rule enabled state such as enabled disabled on or off. 规则启用状态，例如启用、禁用、开启或关闭。
Whether logging is enabled for the rule. 该规则是否开启日志记录。
Translated source address for NAT policies. NAT 策略中的转换后源地址。
Public mapped address for IP or port mapping policies. IP 映射或端口映射策略中的公网映射地址。
Internal address or object used by mapping policies. 映射策略中的内网地址或内网对象。
Public mapped service or port. 公网侧映射服务或端口。
Internal mapped service or port. 内网侧映射服务或端口。
Security zone name extracted from zone configuration events. 从安全域配置事件中提取的安全域名称。
IP address added removed shown or cleared by blacklist events. 黑名单事件中添加、删除、显示或清空的 IP 地址。
